title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Apollo Pharmacy

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Apollo Pharmacy
jsonLd.description:
Apollo Pharmacy is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Mysuru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Apollo Pharmacy:
Apollo Pharmacy is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Pharmacy!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
